name: 8967bb57-8bdf-49e3-80dc-7f2d2b12b8cf
description: Marks a coaching module or micro-lesson as complete.

module_name.description: The specific name of the coaching module or micro-lesson being completed (e.g., 'Values & Identity').

module_takeaway.description: A short, one-sentence summary of what the user learned, realized, or committed to in this module.

error.description: Optional. A human-readable message describing what went wrong if the operation failed.

status.description: Indicates the result of the operation. Returns a success string if the module was marked complete.
